"There are too few jobs available for me in my ideal commuting time"

Just Transit:

```{r}
fj_ame_transit <- svyAME(FewJobs_ordinal_3modes,
              varname = "SA_pp_Transit",
              diffchange = "range",
              seed = 51)

fj_ame_transit_df <- fj_ame_transit$preds

SA_pp_Transit_scaled_fj <- scale(FewJobs_ordinal_3modes$survey.design$variables$SA_pp_Transit_unscaled)

mu_transit_fj <- attr(SA_pp_Transit_scaled_fj, "scaled:center")
sigma_transit_fj <- attr(SA_pp_Transit_scaled_fj, "scaled:scale")

fj_ame_transit_df <- fj_ame_transit_df %>%
  mutate(SA_pp_Transit_unscaled = SA_pp_Transit * sigma_transit_fj + mu_transit_fj)


AME_transit_fj <- ggplot(fj_ame_transit_df) +
  aes(x = SA_pp_Transit_unscaled, y = predicted, ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, colour = y, fill = y) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(colour = "transparent", alpha = 0.05) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) + 
  labs(x = "Public transit accessibility",
       y = "Predicted probability",
       color = "Perception group", fill = "Perception group",
       title = str_wrap("\"There are too few jobs available for me in my ideal commuting time\"", width = 70)) +
theme_minimal() +
facet_wrap(~y, ncol = 3)  +
scale_color_manual(values = my_colors_likert) +
scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_likert) +
theme(legend.position = "bottom",
legend.direction = "horizontal",
legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
plot.title = element_text(face = "italic"))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/ordinal/average-marginal-effect-transit-accessibility.jpg"),
plot = AME_transit_fj,
width = 17,
height = 12,
units = "cm",
dpi = 300)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/ordinal/average-marginal-effect-transit-accessibility.jpg"))
```

```{r}
probabilities_transit_linear_fj <- predict_subset_standads_ordinal_fj %>%
ggplot(aes(x = Value, y = Probability, color = Likert)) +
geom_line(linewidth = 0.75, alpha = 0.9) +
geom_vline(data = accessibility_lines,
aes(xintercept = Value),
linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.75, linewidth = 0.3, color = "#666666") +
annotate("text", x = median_sa, y = Inf,
label = paste0("Median: ", round(median_sa,2)),
angle = 90,
hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
annotate("text", x = max_sa, y = Inf,
label = paste0("Max: ", round(max_sa,2)),
angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 3, color = "#333333") +
labs(x = "Number of jobs reached by public transit per person",
y = "Predicted probability",
color = "Perception group",
title = str_wrap("\"There are too few jobs available for me in my ideal commuting time\"", width = 70)) +
# coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100),
#                 xlim = c(0, 1.10 * max_sa )) +
theme_minimal() +
facet_wrap(~Equity, ncol = 3)  +
scale_color_manual(values = my_colors_likert) +
scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_likert) +
theme(legend.position = "bottom",
legend.direction = "horizontal",
legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
plot.title = element_text(face = "italic"))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/ordinal/accessibility-effect-transit-fj.jpg"),
plot = probabilities_transit_linear_fj,
width = 18,
height = 9,
units = "cm",
dpi = 300)

ggsave(file = paste0(here(),"/manuscript/figures/accessibility-effect-transit-fj.jpg"),
plot = probabilities_transit_linear_fj,
width = 18,
height = 9,
units = "cm",
dpi = 300)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/ordinal/accessibility-effect-transit-fj.jpg"))
```

```{r}
for(caso in unique(predict_subset_ordinal$Case)){
probabilities_fj <- predict_subset_ordinal %>%
filter(Case == caso) %>%
mutate(Likert = factor(Likert, levels = Likert_order)) %>%
ggplot(aes(x = Value, y = Probability, color = Likert)) +
geom_line(linewidth = 0.75) +
labs(x = "Number of jobs reached",
y = "Predicted probability",
color = "Few jobs available",
title = str_wrap(caso, width = 80)) +
#coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) +
theme_minimal() +
facet_wrap(~ Mode, ncol = 3)  +
scale_color_manual(values = my_colors_likert) +
scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_likert) +
theme(#legend.position = "bottom",
legend.direction = "vertical",
legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
legend.text = element_text(size = 9))
ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images, "/ordinal/", caso,".jpg"),
plot = probabilities_fj,
width = 20,
height = 8,
units = "cm",
dpi = 300)
}
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/ordinal/", priority_group,".jpg"))
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/ordinal/", non_priority_group,".jpg"))
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/ordinal/",majority_group,".jpg"))
```

# Key Thresholds

Identifying key thresholds for transit accessibility:

```{r}
##################################
##################################

outcome <- "Few jobs accessible - Ordinal" 
"There are too few jobs available for me in my ideal commuting time"

##################################
##################################

standard_fj <- predict_subset_standads_ordinal_fj %>%
dplyr::select(Value, Probability, Likert, Equity) %>%
pivot_wider(names_from = Likert, values_from = Probability)

conservative_threshold <-  standard_fj %>%
group_by(Equity) %>%
arrange(Value, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
filter(`Positive` + `Most Positive` + Neutral > Negative + `Most Negative`) %>%
slice_head(n = 1) %>%
ungroup() %>%
dplyr::select(Equity, Value) %>%
rename(Conservative = Value)

progressive_threshold <-  standard_fj %>%
group_by(Equity) %>%
arrange(Value, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
filter(`Positive` + `Most Positive` > Negative + `Most Negative`) %>%
slice_head(n = 1) %>%
ungroup() %>%
dplyr::select(Equity, Value) %>%
rename(Progressive = Value)

standards_df <- conservative_threshold %>%
left_join(progressive_threshold, by = "Equity") %>%
mutate(Intermediate = round((Progressive - Conservative)/2 + Conservative, 2))

standards_df_long <- standards_df %>%
pivot_longer(cols = c(Conservative, Progressive, Intermediate), values_to = "Value", names_to = "Type") %>%
filter(!Equity == non_priority_group_name)

standards_df
```

## Plots

```{r}
probabilities_ordinal_dis_thresholds_area <- predict_subset_standads_ordinal_fj %>%
filter(Equity == priority_group_name) %>%
ggplot(aes(x = Value, y = Probability,  fill = Likert, color = Likert)) +
geom_area(alpha = 0.35, position = "stack", linewidth = 0) +
geom_vline(data = accessibility_lines,
aes(xintercept = Value),
linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.75, linewidth = 0.3, color = "#666666") +
annotate("text", x = median_sa, y = 100,
label = paste0("Median: ", round(median_sa, 2)),
angle = 90,
hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
annotate("text", x = max_sa, y = 100,
label = paste0("Max: ", round(max_sa, 2)),
angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
geom_vline(data = standards_df_long %>%
filter(Equity == priority_group_name),
aes(xintercept = standards_df_long %>%
filter(Equity == priority_group_name) %>%
pull(Value)),
linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.75, linewidth = 0.3, color = "#666666") +
geom_text(data = standards_df_long %>%
filter(Equity == priority_group_name),
aes(x = Value, y = 60,
label = paste0(Type, ": ", round(Value, 2))),
inherit.aes = FALSE,
angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 3,
color = "#333333", fontface = "bold") +
labs(x = "Number of jobs reached by public transit per person",
y = paste0("Probability: ", priority_group_name),
color = "Perception Group", fill = "Perception Group",
title = str_wrap("\"There are too few jobs available for me in my ideal commuting time\"", width = 65)) +
coord_cartesian(#ylim = c(0, 100),
xlim = c(0, 1.10 * max_sa )) +
theme_minimal() +
#facet_wrap(~Outcome, ncol = 2)  +
scale_color_manual(values = my_colors_likert) +
scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_likert) +
theme(#legend.position = "bottom",
legend.direction = "vertical",
legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
plot.title = element_text(face = "italic"))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/accessibility-effect-transit-ordinals-dis-standards_area.jpg"),
plot = probabilities_ordinal_dis_thresholds_area,
width = 15,
height = 9,
units = "cm",
dpi = 300)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/accessibility-effect-transit-ordinals-dis-standards_area.jpg"))
```

```{r}
probabilities_ordinal_ndis_thresholds_area <- predict_subset_standads_ordinal_fj %>%
filter(Equity == non_priority_group_name) %>%
ggplot(aes(x = Value, y = Probability,  fill = Likert, color = Likert)) +
geom_area(alpha = 0.35, position = "stack", linewidth = 0) +
geom_vline(data = accessibility_lines,
aes(xintercept = Value),
linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.75, linewidth = 0.3, color = "#666666") +
annotate("text", x = median_sa, y = 100,
label = paste0("Median: ", round(median_sa, 2)),
angle = 90,
hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
annotate("text", x = max_sa, y = 100,
label = paste0("Max: ", round(max_sa, 2)),
angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
geom_vline(data = standards_df_long %>%
filter(Equity == non_priority_group_name),
aes(xintercept = standards_df_long %>%
filter(Equity == non_priority_group_name) %>%
pull(Value)),
linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.75, linewidth = 0.3, color = "#666666") +
geom_text(data = standards_df_long %>%
filter(Equity == non_priority_group_name),
aes(x = Value, y = 60,
label = paste0(Type, ": ", round(Value, 2))),
inherit.aes = FALSE,
angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 3,
color = "#333333", fontface = "bold") +
labs(x = "Number of jobs reached by public transit per person",
y = paste0("Probability: ", non_priority_group_name),
color = "Perception Group", fill = "Perception Group",
title = str_wrap("\"There are too few jobs available for me in my ideal commuting time\"", width = 65)) +
coord_cartesian(#ylim = c(0, 100),
xlim = c(0, 1.10 * max_sa )) +
theme_minimal() +
#facet_wrap(~Outcome, ncol = 2)  +
scale_color_manual(values = my_colors_likert) +
scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_likert) +
theme(#legend.position = "bottom",
legend.direction = "vertical",
legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
plot.title = element_text(face = "italic"))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/accessibility-effect-transit-ordinals-ndis-standards_area.jpg"),
plot = probabilities_ordinal_ndis_thresholds_area,
width = 15,
height = 9,
units = "cm",
dpi = 300)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/accessibility-effect-transit-ordinals-ndis-standards_area.jpg"))
```

```{r}
probabilities_ordinal_maj_thresholds_area <- predict_subset_standads_ordinal_fj %>%
filter(Equity == majority_group_name) %>%
ggplot(aes(x = Value, y = Probability,  fill = Likert, color = Likert)) +
geom_area(alpha = 0.35, position = "stack", linewidth = 0) +
geom_vline(data = accessibility_lines,
aes(xintercept = Value),
linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.75, linewidth = 0.3, color = "#666666") +
annotate("text", x = median_sa, y = 100,
label = paste0("Median: ", round(median_sa, 2)),
angle = 90,
hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
annotate("text", x = max_sa, y = 100,
label = paste0("Max: ", round(max_sa, 2)),
angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
geom_vline(data = standards_df_long %>%
filter(Equity == majority_group_name),
aes(xintercept = standards_df_long %>%
filter(Equity == majority_group_name) %>%
pull(Value)),
linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.75, linewidth = 0.3, color = "#666666") +
geom_text(data = standards_df_long %>%
filter(Equity == majority_group_name),
aes(x = Value, y = 60,
label = paste0(Type, ": ", round(Value, 2))),
inherit.aes = FALSE,
angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 3,
color = "#333333", fontface = "bold") +
labs(x = "Number of jobs reached by public transit per person",
y = paste0("Probability: ", majority_group_name),
color = "Perception Group", fill = "Perception Group",
title = str_wrap("\"There are too few jobs available for me in my ideal commuting time\"", width = 65)) +
coord_cartesian(#ylim = c(0, 100),
xlim = c(0, 1.10 * max_sa )) +
theme_minimal() +
#facet_wrap(~Outcome, ncol = 2)  +
scale_color_manual(values = my_colors_likert) +
scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_likert) +
theme(#legend.position = "bottom",
legend.direction = "vertical",
legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
plot.title = element_text(face = "italic"))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/accessibility-effect-transit-ordinals-maj-standards_area.jpg"),
plot = probabilities_ordinal_maj_thresholds_area,
width = 15,
height = 9,
units = "cm",
dpi = 300)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/accessibility-effect-transit-ordinals-maj-standards_area.jpg"))
```

Area plots:

```{r}
probabilities_ordinal_thresholds_area <- predict_subset_standads_ordinal_fj %>% 
   ggplot(aes(x = Value, y = Probability, fill = Likert, color = Likert)) +
geom_area(alpha = 0.35, position = "stack", linewidth = 0) +
   
   geom_vline(data = accessibility_lines,
              aes(xintercept = Value),
              linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.75, linewidth = 0.3, color = "#666666") +
   
   annotate("text", x = median_sa, y = 100, 
            label = paste0("Median: ", round(median_sa, 2)), 
            angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
   annotate("text", x = max_sa, y = 100, 
            label = paste0("Max: ", round(max_sa, 2)), 
            angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
   
   geom_vline(data = standards_df_long,
              aes(xintercept = Value),
              linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.75, linewidth = 0.3, color = "#666666") +
   

    geom_text(data = standards_df_long,
          aes(x = Value, y = 60, 
              label = paste0(Type,": ",round(Value, 2))),
          inherit.aes = FALSE,
          angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 3,
          color = "#333333", fontface = "bold") + 
   
   labs(x = "Number of jobs reached by public transit per transit user",
        y = "Probability",
        color = "Perception Group", fill = "Perception Group", 
        title = str_wrap("\"There are too few jobs available for me in my ideal commuting time\"", width = 65)) +
   coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1.10 * max_sa)) +
   theme_minimal() + 
   facet_wrap(~Equity, ncol = 3) +
   scale_color_manual(values = my_colors_likert) +
   scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_likert) + 
   theme(legend.direction = "horizontal", legend.position = "bottom",     
         legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
         legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
         plot.title = element_text(face = "italic"))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/accessibility-effect-transit-ordinals-standards_area.jpg"),
        plot = probabilities_ordinal_thresholds_area,
        width = 18,
        height = 10,
        units = "cm",
        dpi = 300)

ggsave(file = paste0(here(),"/manuscript/figures/accessibility-threshold.jpg"),
        plot = probabilities_ordinal_thresholds_area,
        width = 18,
        height = 10,
        units = "cm",
        dpi = 300)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/accessibility-effect-transit-ordinals-standards_area.jpg"))
```

## FGT

Identifying priority areas based on their transit accessibility gap:

```{r}
intermediate_threshold <- standards_df %>%
filter(Equity == priority_group_name) %>%
pull(Intermediate)

conservative_threshold <- standards_df %>%
filter(Equity == priority_group_name) %>%
pull(Conservative)

progressive_threshold <- standards_df %>%
filter(Equity == priority_group_name) %>%
pull(Progressive)

priority_geo_areas <- census_tracts %>% 
  sf::st_drop_geometry() %>% 
  left_join(accessibilities_wide, by = "CTUID") %>% 
  filter(!is.na(SA_pp_Transit)) %>% 
  group_by(CTUID) %>% 
  dplyr::summarise(SA_pp_Transit = first(SA_pp_Transit, na_rm = TRUE),
               Weighted_Pop = Population) %>% 
  mutate(range_cons = conservative_threshold - SA_pp_Transit, 
         range_prog = progressive_threshold - SA_pp_Transit, 
         range_inte = intermediate_threshold - SA_pp_Transit, 
         AFI_cons = range_cons * Weighted_Pop, 
         AFI_prog = range_prog * Weighted_Pop, 
         AFI_inte = range_inte * Weighted_Pop)

# Conservative threshold 
cons_classification <- priority_geo_areas %>% 
  filter(range_cons > 0)

q2  <- quantile(cons_classification$AFI_cons, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)   
q50 <- quantile(cons_classification$AFI_cons, 0.50, na.rm = TRUE)   
q75 <- quantile(cons_classification$AFI_cons, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE) 

cons_classification <- cons_classification %>% 
  mutate(priority_cons = case_when(AFI_cons > q75 ~ "Very-high priority",
                              AFI_cons > q50 & AFI_cons <= q75 ~ "High priority",
                              AFI_cons > q2  & AFI_cons <= q50 ~ "Moderate priority",
                              AFI_cons <= q2 ~ "Low priority", 
                              TRUE ~ "No deficit")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(CTUID, priority_cons)

# Progressive threshold 

prog_classification <- priority_geo_areas %>% 
  filter(range_prog > 0)

q2  <- quantile(prog_classification$AFI_prog, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)   
q50 <- quantile(prog_classification$AFI_prog, 0.50, na.rm = TRUE)   
q75 <- quantile(prog_classification$AFI_prog, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE) 

prog_classification <- prog_classification %>% 
  mutate(priority_prog = case_when(AFI_prog > q75 ~ "Very-high priority",
                              AFI_prog > q50 & AFI_prog <= q75 ~ "High priority",
                              AFI_prog > q2  & AFI_prog <= q50 ~ "Moderate priority",
                              AFI_prog <= q2 ~ "Low priority", 
                              TRUE ~ "No deficit")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(CTUID, priority_prog)

# Intermediate threshold 

inte_classification <- priority_geo_areas %>% 
  filter(range_inte > 0)

q2  <- quantile(inte_classification$AFI_inte, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)   
q50 <- quantile(inte_classification$AFI_inte, 0.50, na.rm = TRUE)   
q75 <- quantile(inte_classification$AFI_inte, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE) 

inte_classification <- inte_classification %>% 
  mutate(priority_inte = case_when(AFI_inte > q75 ~ "Very-high priority",
                              AFI_inte > q50 & AFI_inte <= q75 ~ "High priority",
                              AFI_inte > q2  & AFI_inte <= q50 ~ "Moderate priority",
                              AFI_inte <= q2 ~ "Low priority", 
                              TRUE ~ "No deficit")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(CTUID, priority_inte)


priority_geo_areas <- priority_geo_areas %>% 
  left_join(cons_classification, by = "CTUID") %>% 
  left_join(prog_classification, by = "CTUID") %>% 
  left_join(inte_classification, by = "CTUID")
```

Calculating FGT measures:

```{r}
fgt_equity <- function(df, threshold) {
  N <- df %>% 
    dplyr::summarize(Weighted_Pop = sum(Weighted_Pop, na.rm = TRUE))
  
  headcount <-
    df %>%
    filter(SA_pp_Transit <= threshold) %>%
    dplyr::summarize(fgt0_toSum = sum(Weighted_Pop),
              Unweighted = n(), 
              fgt1_toSum = sum(Weighted_Pop * ((threshold - SA_pp_Transit)/threshold)),
              fgt2_toSum = sum(Weighted_Pop * ((threshold - SA_pp_Transit)/threshold)^2))

    fg <- mutate(headcount,
               Weighted_Pop = N$Weighted_Pop, 
               fgt0 = fgt0_toSum / Weighted_Pop,
               fgt1 = fgt1_toSum / Weighted_Pop,
               fgt2 = fgt2_toSum / Weighted_Pop,
               quant = threshold)
}

fgt_equity_intermediate <- fgt_equity(df = priority_geo_areas, 
                        threshold = intermediate_threshold) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  mutate(priority = "General", Threshold = "Intermediate")

fgt_equity_conservative <- fgt_equity(df = priority_geo_areas, 
                               threshold = conservative_threshold) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  mutate(priority = "General", Threshold = "Conservative")

fgt_equity_progressive <- fgt_conservative <- fgt_equity(df = priority_geo_areas, 
                                                  threshold = progressive_threshold) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  mutate(priority = "General", Threshold = "Progressive")

fgt_priorities <- function(df, threshold, priority) {
  N <- df %>% 
    dplyr::summarize(Weighted_Pop = sum(Weighted_Pop, na.rm = TRUE))
  
  headcount <- df %>%
    filter(SA_pp_Transit <= threshold) %>%
    group_by(.data[[priority]]) %>%
    dplyr::summarize(fgt0_toSum = sum(Weighted_Pop),
                            Unweighted = n(), 
      fgt1_toSum = sum(Weighted_Pop * ((threshold - SA_pp_Transit)/threshold)),
      fgt2_toSum = sum(Weighted_Pop * ((threshold - SA_pp_Transit)/threshold)^2),
      .groups = "drop")
  
  fg <- headcount %>% 
    mutate(Weighted_Pop = N$Weighted_Pop, 
      fgt0 = fgt0_toSum / Weighted_Pop,
      fgt1 = fgt1_toSum / Weighted_Pop,
      fgt2 = fgt2_toSum / Weighted_Pop,
      quant = threshold)
  
  return(fg)
}

fgt_prior_intermediate <- fgt_priorities(
  df = priority_geo_areas,
  threshold = intermediate_threshold,
  priority = "priority_inte") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  rename(priority = priority_inte) %>% 
  mutate(Threshold = "Intermediate")
  
fgt_prior_conservative <- fgt_priorities(
  df = priority_geo_areas,
  threshold = conservative_threshold,
  priority = "priority_cons") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  rename(priority = priority_cons) %>% 
  mutate(Threshold = "Conservative")

fgt_prior_progressive <- fgt_priorities(
  df = priority_geo_areas,
  threshold = progressive_threshold,
  priority = "priority_prog") %>% 
  rename(priority = priority_prog) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  mutate(Threshold = "Progressive")

fgt_measures <- bind_rows(fgt_equity_intermediate, fgt_equity_conservative, fgt_equity_progressive,
                           fgt_prior_intermediate, fgt_prior_conservative, fgt_prior_progressive) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(priority)) 
```

Plotting graphs of FGT measures:

```{r}
plot_fgt_data <-  fgt_measures %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = c(fgt0, fgt1, fgt2)) %>%
  mutate(name = ifelse(name == "fgt0", "FGT-0",
                ifelse(name == "fgt1", "FGT-1", "FGT-2")), 
         pop = "Population")

priority_order <- c("General", 
                   "Very-high priority", 
                   "High priority", 
                   "Moderate priority", 
                   "Low priority")

my_colors <- c("#525252","#e31a1c","#fd8d3c", "#feb24c","#fed976")

names(my_colors) <- priority_order
  
plot_fgt <- plot_fgt_data %>% 
  mutate(priority = factor(priority, levels = priority_order)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y = Threshold, x = value, fill = priority)) + 
  geom_point(size = 2.5, alpha = 0.70, pch=21, colour = "black")  + 
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors) +
  facet_wrap(~ name) + 
  theme_minimal() +
  xlab(NULL) + 
  ylab(NULL) + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

ggplot2::ggsave(plot = plot_fgt, 
          filename = paste0(diretorio_export_images,"FGT_plots.jpg"), 
          width = 18, 
          height= 5, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 300)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/FGT_plots.jpg"))
```

```{r}
FGT_plots_general <- plot_fgt_data %>% 
  filter(priority == "General") %>%
  mutate(priority = factor(priority, levels = priority_order)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y = Threshold, x = value , fill = priority)) + 
  geom_point(size = 2.5, alpha = 0.70, pch = 21, colour = "black") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = round(value, 2)), 
            hjust = 0, vjust = -0.5, size = 3) +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors) +
  facet_wrap(~ name) + 
  theme_minimal() +
  xlab(NULL) + 
  ylab(NULL) + 
  theme(legend.position = NULL,
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

ggplot2::ggsave(plot = FGT_plots_general, 
          filename = paste0(diretorio_export_images,"FGT_plots_general.jpg"), 
          width = 18, 
          height= 5, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 300)

ggplot2::ggsave(plot = FGT_plots_general, 
          filename = paste0(here(),"/manuscript/figures/FGT_plots_general.jpg"), 
          width = 18, 
          height= 5, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 300)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/FGT_plots_general.jpg"))
```

```{r}
FGT01_plots_general <- plot_fgt_data %>% 
  filter(priority == "General", !name %in% c("FGT-2")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y = Threshold, x = value)) + 
  geom_point(size = 2.5, alpha = 0.70, pch = 21, colour = "black", fill = "grey70") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = round(value, 2)), 
            hjust = 0, vjust = -0.5, size = 3) +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors) +
  facet_wrap(~ name) + 
  theme_minimal() +
  xlab(NULL) + 
  ylab(NULL) + 
  theme(legend.position = NULL,
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

ggplot2::ggsave(plot = FGT01_plots_general, 
          filename = paste0(diretorio_export_images,"FGT01_plots_general.jpg"), 
          width = 18, 
          height= 5, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 300)

ggplot2::ggsave(plot = FGT01_plots_general, 
          filename = paste0(here(),"/manuscript/figures/FGT01_plots_general.jpg"), 
          width = 18, 
          height= 5, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 300)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/FGT01_plots_general.jpg"))
```


## Maps 
Plotting priority areas for each standard:

```{r}
priority_geo_areas <- priority_geo_areas %>%
   mutate(priority_cons = replace_na(priority_cons, "No deficit"),
          priority_prog = replace_na(priority_prog, "No deficit"),
          priority_inte = replace_na(priority_inte, "No deficit"))

priority_geo_areas_long_a <- priority_geo_areas %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = c("AFI_cons", "AFI_prog", "AFI_inte"),
               names_to = c("AFI_type"), 
               values_to  ="AFI_value") %>%
  mutate(AFI_type = case_when(AFI_type == 'AFI_cons' ~ "Conservative", 
                   AFI_type == 'AFI_prog' ~ "Progressive", 
                   AFI_type == 'AFI_inte' ~ "Intermediate")) %>%
    dplyr::select("CTUID","AFI_type", "AFI_value")

  
priority_geo_areas_long_b <- priority_geo_areas %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = c("priority_cons", "priority_prog", "priority_inte"),
               names_to = c("Priority_type"), 
               values_to  = "Priority_value") %>%
  mutate(Priority_type = case_when(Priority_type == 'priority_cons' ~ "Conservative", 
                   Priority_type == 'priority_prog' ~ "Progressive", 
                   Priority_type == 'priority_inte' ~ "Intermediate")) %>% 
      dplyr::select("CTUID","Priority_type", "Priority_value")


priority_geo_areas_long <- priority_geo_areas_long_a %>% 
  left_join(priority_geo_areas_long_b, 
            by = c("CTUID" = "CTUID", 
                   "AFI_type" = "Priority_type")) %>% 
  distinct(CTUID, AFI_type, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  full_join(census_tracts, by = c("CTUID" = "CTUID"))


priority_order <- c("Very-high priority", 
                   "High priority", 
                   "Moderate priority", 
                   "Low priority")

my_colors <- c("#e31a1c","#fd8d3c", "#feb24c","#fed976")

names(my_colors) <- priority_order
  
priority_geo_areas_long <- priority_geo_areas_long %>% 
  mutate(Priority_value = factor(Priority_value, levels = priority_order), 
                  pcd_label = case_when(PCD == "3518" ~ "Durham", 
                               PCD == "3519" ~ "York", 
                               PCD == "3520" ~ "Toronto", 
                               PCD == "3521" ~ "Peel", 
                               PCD == "3524" ~ "Halton", 
                               PCD == "3525" ~ "Hamilton")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(AFI_type)) %>% 
  st_as_sf(crs = st_crs(census_tracts)) %>%
  mutate(facet_title =
           case_when(AFI_type == "Conservative" ~ paste0(AFI_type, ": ", round(conservative_threshold,2)), 
                     AFI_type == "Intermediate" ~ paste0(AFI_type, ": ", round(intermediate_threshold,2)), 
                     AFI_type == "Progressive" ~ paste0(AFI_type, ": ", round(progressive_threshold,2))))

census_subdivisions$pcsd_label <- sub("\\s*\\(.*", "", census_subdivisions$CSDNAME)

priority_geo_areas_long <- priority_geo_areas_long %>% 
  st_join(census_subdivisions %>% dplyr::select(CSDUID,CSDNAME,  pcsd_label), largest = TRUE) %>% 
  distinct(.keep_all = TRUE)

priority_plot <- tm_shape(priority_geo_areas_long) +
    tm_polygons("Priority_value",
            palette = my_colors,
            style = "cat",
            border.col = NULL,
            textNA = "No deficit",
            title = "Priority Level") +
  tm_facets(by = "facet_title",
    drop.empty.facets = TRUE,
    ncol = 3) +
  tm_shape(census_subdivisions) +
  tm_borders(col = "black", lwd = 0.75) +
  tm_scalebar(position = c("right", "bottom"), breaks = c(0, 10, 15, 25)) +
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size = 1) +
  tm_layout(
    legend.outside = TRUE,
    legend.outside.position = c("right"))

tmap_save(priority_plot, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_images,"geographical_priorities.jpg"), 
          width = 17, 
          height= 10, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 500)

tmap_save(priority_plot, 
          paste0(here(),"/manuscript/figures/geographical_priorities.jpg"), 
          width = 17, 
          height= 10, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 500)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities.jpg"))
```

```{r}
conservative_threshold_plot <- priority_geo_areas_long %>%
  filter(AFI_type == "Conservative") %>% 
  tm_shape(priority_geo_areas_long) +
    tm_polygons("Priority_value",
            palette = my_colors,
            style = "cat",
            border.col = NULL,
            textNA = "No deficit",
            title = paste0("Conservative Threshold: ", conservative_threshold)) + 
  tm_shape(census_subdivisions) +
  tm_borders(col = "black", lwd = 0.75) +
  tm_scalebar(position = c("right", "bottom"), breaks = c(0, 10, 15, 25)) +
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size = 1) +
  tm_layout(
    legend.outside = TRUE,
    legend.outside.position = c("right"))

tmap_save(conservative_threshold_plot, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_images,"geographical_priorities_conservative.jpg"), 
          width = 14, 
          height= 10, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 500)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities_conservative.jpg"))
```

```{r}
conservative_threshold_pcd <- priority_geo_areas_long %>%
  filter(AFI_type == "Conservative") %>% 
  tm_shape(.) + 
  tm_polygons("Priority_value",
            palette = my_colors,
            style = "cat",
            border.col = NULL,
            textNA = "No deficit",
            title = paste0("Conservative Threshold: ", conservative_threshold)) + 
  tm_facets(by = "pcd_label", drop.empty.facets = TRUE, ncol = 3, free.coords = TRUE) +
  tm_shape(census_subdivisions) +
  tm_borders(col = "black", lwd = 0.75)  +
  tm_facets(by = "pcd_label", drop.empty.facets = TRUE, ncol = 3, free.coords = TRUE) +
  tm_scalebar(position = c("left", "bottom"), breaks = c(0, 2, 5)) +
  tm_compass(position = c("right", "top"), size = 0.7) +
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
    legend.outside.position = c("right"))

tmap_save(conservative_threshold_pcd, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities_conservative_pcd.jpg"), 
          width = 18, 
          height= 12, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 500)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities_conservative_pcd.jpg"))
```

```{r}
intermediate_threshold_plot <- priority_geo_areas_long %>%
  filter(AFI_type == "Intermediate") %>% 
  tm_shape(priority_geo_areas_long) +
    tm_polygons("Priority_value",
            palette = my_colors,
            style = "cat",
            border.col = NULL,
            textNA = "No deficit",
            title = paste0("Intermediate Threshold: ", intermediate_threshold)) + 
  tm_shape(census_subdivisions) +
  tm_borders(col = "black", lwd = 0.75) +
  tm_scalebar(position = c("right", "bottom"), breaks = c(0, 10, 15, 25)) +
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size = 1) +
  tm_layout(
    legend.outside = TRUE,
    legend.outside.position = c("right"))

tmap_save(intermediate_threshold_plot, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_images,"geographical_priorities_intermediate.jpg"), 
          width = 14, 
          height= 10, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 500)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities_intermediate.jpg"))
```

```{r}
intermediate_threshold_pcd <- priority_geo_areas_long %>%
  filter(AFI_type == "Intermediate") %>% 
  tm_shape(.) + 
  tm_polygons("Priority_value",
            palette = my_colors,
            style = "cat",
            border.col = NULL,
            textNA = "No deficit",
            title = paste0("Intermediate Threshold: ", intermediate_threshold)) + 
  tm_facets(by = "pcd_label", drop.empty.facets = TRUE, ncol = 3, free.coords = TRUE) +
  tm_shape(census_subdivisions) +
  tm_borders(col = "black", lwd = 0.75)  +
  tm_facets(by = "pcd_label", drop.empty.facets = TRUE, ncol = 3, free.coords = TRUE) +
  tm_scalebar(position = c("left", "bottom"), breaks = c(0, 2, 5)) +
  tm_compass(position = c("right", "top"), size = 0.7) +
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
    legend.outside.position = c("right"))

tmap_save(intermediate_threshold_pcd, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities_intermediate_pcd.jpg"), 
          width = 18, 
          height= 12, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 500)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities_intermediate_pcd.jpg"))
```

```{r}
progressive_threshold_plot <- priority_geo_areas_long %>%
  filter(AFI_type == "Progressive") %>% 
  tm_shape(priority_geo_areas_long) +
    tm_polygons("Priority_value",
            palette = my_colors,
            style = "cat",
            border.col = NULL,
            textNA = "No deficit",
            title = paste0("Progressive Threshold: ", round(progressive_threshold,2))) + 
  tm_shape(census_subdivisions) +
  tm_borders(col = "black", lwd = 0.75) +
  tm_scalebar(position = c("right", "bottom"), breaks = c(0, 10, 15, 25)) +
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size = 1) +
  tm_layout(
    legend.outside = TRUE,
    legend.outside.position = c("right"))

tmap_save(progressive_threshold_plot, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_images,"geographical_priorities_progressive.jpg"), 
          width = 14, 
          height= 10, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 500)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities_progressive.jpg"))
```

```{r}
progressive_threshold_pcd <- priority_geo_areas_long %>%
  filter(AFI_type == "Progressive") %>% 
  tm_shape(.) + 
  tm_polygons("Priority_value",
            palette = my_colors,
            style = "cat",
            border.col = NULL,
            textNA = "No deficit",
            title = paste0("Progressive Threshold: ", round(progressive_threshold,2))) + 
  tm_facets(by = "pcd_label", drop.empty.facets = TRUE, ncol = 3, free.coords = TRUE) +
  tm_shape(census_subdivisions) +
  tm_borders(col = "black", lwd = 0.75)  +
  tm_facets(by = "pcd_label", drop.empty.facets = TRUE, ncol = 3, free.coords = TRUE) +
  tm_scalebar(position = c("left", "bottom"), breaks = c(0, 2, 5)) +
  tm_compass(position = c("right", "top"), size = 0.7) +
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
    legend.outside.position = c("right"))

tmap_save(progressive_threshold_pcd, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities_progressive_pcd.jpg"), 
          width = 18, 
          height= 12, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 500)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities_progressive_pcd.jpg"))
```

```{r}
priority_plot_3520 <- tm_shape(priority_geo_areas_long %>% filter(PCD == 3520)) +
    tm_polygons("Priority_value",
            palette = my_colors,
            style = "cat",
            border.col = NULL,
            textNA = "No deficit",
            title = "Priority Level") +
  tm_facets(by = "facet_title",
    drop.empty.facets = TRUE,
    ncol = 3) +
  tm_shape(census_subdivisions) +
  tm_borders(col = "black", lwd = 0.75) +
  tm_scalebar(position = c("right", "bottom"), breaks = c(0, 2.5, 5)) +
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size = 0.7) +
  tm_layout(
    legend.outside = TRUE,
    legend.outside.position = c("right"))

tmap_save(priority_plot_3520, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_images,"geographical_priorities_3520.jpg"), 
          width = 17, 
          height= 10, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 500)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities_3520.jpg"))
```

```{r}
priority_plot_3525 <- tm_shape(priority_geo_areas_long %>% filter(PCD == 3525)) +
    tm_polygons("Priority_value",
            palette = my_colors,
            style = "cat",
            border.col = NULL,
            textNA = "No deficit",
            title = "Priority Level") +
  tm_facets(by = "facet_title",
    drop.empty.facets = TRUE,
    ncol = 3) +
  tm_shape(census_subdivisions) +
  tm_borders(col = "black", lwd = 0.75) +
  tm_scalebar(position = c("right", "bottom"), breaks = c(0, 2.5, 5)) +
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size = 0.7) +
  tm_layout(
    legend.outside = TRUE,
    legend.outside.position = c("right"))

tmap_save(priority_plot_3525, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_images,"geographical_priorities_3525.jpg"), 
          width = 17, 
          height= 10, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 500)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities_3525.jpg"))
```

# Saving model files

## Models

```{r}
# First Stage Regressions
saveRDS(design_respondents, paste0(diretorio_export,"respondents_design_first_stage.rds"))

saveRDS(stage1_transit_SA_pp, paste0(diretorio_export,"stage1_transit_SA_pp.rds"))
saveRDS(stage1_car_SA_pp, paste0(diretorio_export,"stage1_car_SA_pp.rds"))
saveRDS(stage1_active_SA_pp, paste0(diretorio_export,"stage1_active_SA_pp.rds"))

saveRDS(wald_transit, paste0(diretorio_export,"wald_transit.rds"))
saveRDS(wald_car, paste0(diretorio_export,"wald_car.rds"))
saveRDS(wald_active, paste0(diretorio_export,"wald_active.rds"))
```

```{r}
### LINEAR 

saveRDS(EasyToGo_3mode_lm_SA_pp_clean_design, paste0(diretorio_export,"easy_to_reach_design_linear.rds"))
saveRDS(DeclineEmployment_3mode_lm_SA_pp_clean_design, paste0(diretorio_export,"decline_employment_design_linear.rds"))
saveRDS(TravelTooLong_3mode_lm_SA_pp_clean_design, paste0(diretorio_export,"travel_too_long_design_linear.rds"))
saveRDS(FewJobs_3mode_lm_SA_pp_clean_design, paste0(diretorio_export,"few_jobs_design_linear.rds"))

saveRDS(TravelTooLong_3mode_lm_SA_pp_clean, paste0(diretorio_export,"travel_too_long_linear.rds"))
saveRDS(EasyToGo_3mode_lm_SA_pp_clean, paste0(diretorio_export,"easy_to_reach_linear.rds"))
saveRDS(DeclineEmployment_3mode_lm_SA_pp_clean, paste0(diretorio_export,"decline_employment_linear.rds"))
saveRDS(FewJobs_3mode_lm_SA_pp_clean, paste0(diretorio_export,"few_jobs_linear.rds"))
```

```{r}
# ORDINAL 

saveRDS(design_ordinal_norm_etg, paste0(diretorio_export,"easy_to_reach_design_ordinal.rds"))
saveRDS(design_ordinal_norm_de, paste0(diretorio_export,"decline_employment_design_ordinal.rds"))
saveRDS(design_ordinal_norm_ttg, paste0(diretorio_export,"travel_too_long_design_ordinal.rds"))
saveRDS(design_ordinal_norm_fj, paste0(diretorio_export,"few_jobs_design_ordinal.rds"))

saveRDS(FewJobs_ordinal_3modes, paste0(diretorio_export,"few_jobs_ordinal.rds"))
saveRDS(EasyToGo_ordinal_3modes, paste0(diretorio_export,"easy_to_reach_ordinal.rds"))
saveRDS(DeclineEmployment_ordinal_3modes, paste0(diretorio_export,"decline_employment_ordinal.rds"))
saveRDS(TravelTooLong_ordinal_3modes, paste0(diretorio_export,"travel_too_long_ordinal.rds"))
```

```{r}
ttl_linear <- broom::tidy(TravelTooLong_3mode_lm_SA_pp_clean)
names(ttl_linear)[2:4] <- paste0(names(ttl_linear)[2:4], "_ttl")

etr_linear <- broom::tidy(EasyToGo_3mode_lm_SA_pp_clean)
names(etr_linear)[2:4] <- paste0(names(etr_linear)[2:4], "_etr")

de_linear <- broom::tidy(DeclineEmployment_3mode_lm_SA_pp_clean)
names(de_linear)[2:4] <- paste0(names(de_linear)[2:4], "_de")

fj_linear <- broom::tidy(FewJobs_3mode_lm_SA_pp_clean)
names(fj_linear)[2:4] <- paste0(names(fj_linear)[2:4], "_fj")

linear_models <- ttl_linear %>% 
  left_join(etr_linear, by = "term") %>%
  left_join(de_linear, by = "term") %>%
  left_join(fj_linear, by = "term")
```

```{r}
write.csv(linear_models, paste0(diretorio_export, "linear_models.csv"), row.names=FALSE)
```

```{r}
etr_ordinal <- broom::tidy(EasyToGo_ordinal_3modes)
names(etr_ordinal)[2:5] <- paste0(names(etr_ordinal)[2:5], "_etr")

fj_ordinal <- broom::tidy(FewJobs_ordinal_3modes)
names(fj_ordinal)[2:5] <- paste0(names(fj_ordinal)[2:5], "_fj")

ttl_ordinal <- broom::tidy(TravelTooLong_ordinal_3modes)
names(ttl_ordinal)[2:5] <- paste0(names(ttl_ordinal)[2:5], "_ttl")

de_ordinal <- broom::tidy(DeclineEmployment_ordinal_3modes)
names(de_ordinal)[2:5] <- paste0(names(de_ordinal)[2:5], "_de")

ordinal_models <- ttl_ordinal %>% 
  left_join(etr_ordinal, by = "term") %>%
  left_join(de_ordinal, by = "term") %>%
  left_join(fj_ordinal, by = "term")
```

```{r}
write.csv(ordinal_models, paste0(diretorio_export, "ordinal_models.csv"), row.names=FALSE)
```

## Data

```{r}
saveRDS(predict_subset, paste0(diretorio_export,"predictions.rds"))
```

```{r}
fgt_measures <- fgt_measures %>% 
  dplyr::select("priority", "Threshold", "quant", "Weighted_Pop", "fgt0_toSum", "fgt1_toSum", "fgt2_toSum", 
                "Weighted_Pop", "fgt0", "fgt1", "fgt2", "Unweighted")

write.csv(fgt_measures, paste0(diretorio_export, "fgt_measures.csv"), row.names=FALSE)
```

```{r}
write.csv(priority_geo_areas, paste0(diretorio_export, "priority_geo_areas.csv"), row.names=FALSE)

write.csv(priority_geo_areas_long, paste0(diretorio_export, "priority_geo_areas.csv"), row.names=FALSE)
```

```{r}
 census_tracts_export <- census_tracts %>% 
  left_join(priority_geo_areas, by = "CTUID") %>% 
  mutate(Conservative = conservative_threshold, 
         Intermediate = intermediate_threshold,
         Progressive = progressive_threshold)

sf::st_write(census_tracts_export, paste0(diretorio_export, "census_tract_with_priorities.gpkg"), append = FALSE)
```

# Tables for paper

```{r}
accesscorr <- Accessibilities %>%
filter(PwMode_label %in% c("Active", "Transit", "Car_motor")) %>%
group_by(PwMode_label) %>%
summarise(Accessibility = cor(Sf_dist_SA_pp, SA_pp_im, method = "pearson", use = "complete.obs")) %>%
rename(Filter = PwMode_label) %>%
mutate(Filter = case_when(Filter == "Car_motor" ~ "Car",
TRUE ~ Filter))

correlations_sf_outcomes <- accesscorr  %>%
left_join(declineemploymentcorr, by = "Filter") %>%
left_join(easytogocorr, by = "Filter") %>%
left_join(traveltoolongcorr, by = "Filter") %>%
left_join(fewjobscorr, by = "Filter")
correlations_sf_outcomes

write.csv(correlations_sf_outcomes, paste0(diretorio_export, "correlations_sf_outcomes.csv"), row.names=FALSE)

write.csv(correlations_sf_outcomes, paste0(here(), "/manuscript/tables/correlations_sf_outcomes.csv"), row.names=FALSE)

write.csv(standards_df, paste0(diretorio_export, "accessibility_thresholds.csv"), row.names=FALSE)

write.csv(standards_df, paste0(here(), "/manuscript/tables/accessibility_thresholds.csv"), row.names=FALSE)
```

```{r}
respondents_design_paper <- svydesign(ids = ~1,  # No clustering
weights = ~fexp_final,
data = respondents %>%
filter(!is.na(FewJobs_Likert) | !is.na(DeclineEmployment_Likert) | !is.na(TravelTooLong_Likert) | !is.na(EasyToGo_Likert)))

saveRDS(respondents_design_paper, paste0(diretorio_export,"respondents_design_paper.rds"))
```

```{r}
disadvantaged_pop_controls <- grid_disadvantaged %>% 
  dplyr::select("LongTermConditions", "Woman_or_genderdiverse", "Indigenous_or_racialized", "CarNumber", "BikeNumber", "hh_income4",  "Temporary_or_refugee",  "hh_size", "Age",  "Match_mode", "Transit_user", "Active_user", "pc_class","TransitPass", "TransitAvailable") %>% 
 distinct(.keep_all = TRUE) %>% 
 mutate(across(everything(), as.character)) %>% 
 pivot_longer(cols = names(.), values_to = priority_group_name, names_to = "Controls")

non_disadvantaged_pop_controls <- grid_non_disadvantaged %>% 
  dplyr::select("LongTermConditions", "Woman_or_genderdiverse", "Indigenous_or_racialized", "CarNumber", "BikeNumber", "hh_income4",  "Temporary_or_refugee",  "hh_size", "Age",  "Match_mode", "Transit_user", "Active_user", "pc_class","TransitPass", "TransitAvailable") %>% 
 distinct(.keep_all = TRUE) %>% 
 mutate(across(everything(), as.character)) %>% 
 pivot_longer(cols = names(.), values_to = non_priority_group_name, names_to = "Controls")

majority_pop_controls <- grid_majority %>% 
  dplyr::select("LongTermConditions", "Woman_or_genderdiverse", "Indigenous_or_racialized", "CarNumber", "BikeNumber", "hh_income4",  "Temporary_or_refugee",  "hh_size", "Age",  "Match_mode", "Transit_user", "Active_user", "pc_class","TransitPass", "TransitAvailable") %>% 
 distinct(.keep_all = TRUE) %>% 
 mutate(across(everything(), as.character)) %>% 
 pivot_longer(cols = names(.), values_to = majority_group_name, names_to = "Controls")

pop_controls <- disadvantaged_pop_controls %>% 
  left_join(majority_pop_controls, by = "Controls") %>%
  left_join(non_disadvantaged_pop_controls, by = "Controls") 

write.csv(pop_controls, paste0(diretorio_export, "pop_controls.csv"), row.names=FALSE)
```

```{r}
summary_pcd_priority_areas <-  priority_geo_areas_long %>% 
  group_by(pcd_label,AFI_type, Priority_value) %>% 
  dplyr::summarise(Population = sum(Population, na.rm = FALSE), CTs = n(),.groups = "drop_last") %>%
  mutate(Priority_value = case_when(
    is.na(Priority_value) ~ "No deficit", TRUE ~ Priority_value)) %>%
  group_by(pcd_label, AFI_type) %>%
  mutate(Pop_percent = Population/sum(Population, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
         CT_percent = CTs/sum(CTs, na.rm = TRUE)*100) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  sf::st_drop_geometry()

summary_pcd_standards <-  summary_pcd_priority_areas %>%
  mutate(priority_category = ifelse(Priority_value == "No deficit",
                                    "No deficit","Deficit")) %>%
  group_by(pcd_label, AFI_type, priority_category) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(Population = sum(Population, na.rm = TRUE), CTs = sum(CTs), .groups = "drop_last") %>%
  group_by(pcd_label, AFI_type) %>%
  mutate(Pop_percent = Population/sum(Population, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,   CT_percent = CTs/sum(CTs, na.rm = TRUE)*100) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  sf::st_drop_geometry()
```


```{r}
census_tracts %>%
  filter(PCD == 3518) %>% 
  pull(Population) %>% 
  sum()

summary_pcd_priority_areas %>%
  filter(AFI_type == "Conservative") %>%
  filter(pcd_label == "Durham") %>% 
  pull(Population) %>% 
  sum()

summary_pcd_standards %>%
  filter(AFI_type == "Conservative") %>%
  filter(pcd_label == "Durham") %>% 
  pull(Population) %>% 
  sum()
```

```{r}
write.csv(summary_pcd_priority_areas, paste0(diretorio_export, "summary_pcd_priority_areas.csv"), row.names=FALSE)

write.csv(summary_pcd_standards, paste0(diretorio_export, "summary_pcd_standards.csv"), row.names=FALSE)
```

```{r}
summary_pcsd_priority_areas <- priority_geo_areas_long %>% 
  group_by(pcsd_label, AFI_type, Priority_value) %>% 
  summarise(Population = sum(Population, na.rm = FALSE), 
    CTs = n(),.groups = "drop_last") %>%
  mutate(Priority_value = case_when(
    is.na(Priority_value) ~ "No deficit", TRUE ~ Priority_value)) %>%
  group_by(pcsd_label, AFI_type) %>%
  mutate(Pop_percent = Population/sum(Population, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
         CT_percent = CTs/sum(CTs, na.rm = TRUE)*100) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  sf::st_drop_geometry()

summary_pcsd_standards <- summary_pcsd_priority_areas %>%
  mutate(priority_category = ifelse(Priority_value == "No deficit",
                                    "No deficit","Deficit")) %>%
  group_by(pcsd_label, AFI_type, priority_category) %>%
  summarise(Population = sum(Population, na.rm = TRUE), 
    CTs = sum(CTs),  .groups = "drop_last") %>%
  group_by(pcsd_label, AFI_type) %>%
  mutate(Pop_percent = Population/sum(Population, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,   CT_percent = CTs/sum(CTs, na.rm = TRUE)*100) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  sf::st_drop_geometry()
```


```{r}
census_tracts %>%
  filter(PCSD == 3518005) %>% 
  pull(Population) %>% 
  sum()

summary_pcsd_priority_areas %>%
  filter(AFI_type == "Conservative") %>%
  filter(pcsd_label == "Ajax") %>% 
  pull(Population) %>% 
  sum()

summary_pcsd_standards %>%
  filter(AFI_type == "Conservative") %>%
  filter(pcsd_label == "Ajax") %>% 
  pull(Population) %>% 
  sum()
```

```{r}
write.csv(summary_pcsd_priority_areas, paste0(diretorio_export, "summary_pcsd_priority_areas.csv"), row.names=FALSE)

write.csv(summary_pcsd_standards, paste0(diretorio_export, "summary_pcsd_standards.csv"), row.names=FALSE)
```

- Another way to categorize the outcome

```{r}
outcomes <- c("FewJobs", "TravelTooLong", "EasyToGo", "DeclineEmployment")

quantile_matrix <- sapply(outcomes, function(v) {
  Hmisc::wtd.quantile(respondents[[v]], 
                      weights = respondents$fexp_final, 
                      probs = c(0, 0.2, 0.4, 0.6, 0.8, 1))})

outcomes_quantile_df <- as.data.frame(quantile_matrix)

outcomes_quantile_df$quantile <- c("0%", "20%", "40%", "60%", "80%", "100%")

outcomes_quantile_df <- outcomes_quantile_df %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -quantile, names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = quantile, values_from = value)

outcomes_quantile_df
```
 
```{r}
complete_data_fj_pretty <- complete_data_fj %>% 
  mutate(FewJobs_Likert_Pretty = 
           cut(FewJobs,
               breaks = c(0,20,40,60,80,100), 
               labels = c("Most Positive", "Positive", "Neutral", "Negative", "Most Negative"),
               include.lowest = TRUE), 
         FewJobs_Likert_Pretty = factor(FewJobs_Likert_Pretty, 
                                              levels = c("Most Negative", "Negative", "Neutral","Positive", "Most Positive"),
             ordered = TRUE))

vars_to_scale <- c("SA_pp_Active", "SA_pp_Transit", "SA_pp_Car_motor",
  "Pop_density", 
  "SA_pp_Active_Res_IV", "SA_pp_Transit_Res_IV", "SA_pp_Car_Res_IV")

complete_data_scaled_fj_pretty <- complete_data_fj_pretty %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(vars_to_scale), 
                function(x) {
                  scaled <- scale(x)
                  return(as.numeric(scaled))
                }))
```

```{r}
design_ordinal_norm_fj_pretty <- svydesign(
  ids = ~1,
  weights = ~fexp_normalized,
  data = complete_data_scaled_fj_pretty)
```

```{r}
FewJobs_formula_3mode_ordinal_SA_pretty <- formula(update(ordinal_SA_pp_3mode_formula, FewJobs_Likert_Pretty ~ .))

FewJobs_ordinal_3modes_pretty <- svyolr(FewJobs_formula_3mode_ordinal_SA_pretty,
                                   design = design_ordinal_norm_fj_pretty)

summary(FewJobs_ordinal_3modes_pretty)
```

```{r}
survey::regTermTest(FewJobs_ordinal_3modes_pretty, "SA_pp_Transit")
```

```{r}
saveRDS(FewJobs_ordinal_3modes_pretty, paste0(diretorio_export,"few_jobs_ordinal_pretty.rds"))

write.csv(outcomes_quantile_df, paste0(diretorio_export, "outcomes_quantile.csv"), row.names=FALSE)
```
